cycle_reasoning: Cycle 20. The CTO has a significant backlog of P1/P2/P3 features and API replacements, so he gets maximum turns. QA is assigned to maintain quality. Product is assigned for roadmap tracking. Designer, Marketing, and Finance are all assigned this cycle as 20 is a multiple of 4, 5, and 10 respectively.
